title: XML-structured agent prompts with role/goal/constraints contract
source: Anthropic 2025-2026 best practices — XML-tagged structured prompts improve accuracy 30%
description: Refactor flat prose AGENT_PROMPTS into XML-tagged templates with explicit sections: identity, goal, constraints, context, uncertainty handling, output contract.
proposed_changes: Restructure AGENT_PROMPTS into XML sections: <agent_identity>, <goal>, <constraints>, <context>, <uncertainty_policy>, <output_format>. Separate Rick personality from operational instructions.
